message:
feat(simulation): tick 156 TutorialSandbox cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Seventh post-storage tick. simulation.rs had 5 `_with_cx` methods;
naive scan flagged 5 missing. Filtering: 2 of those
(`execute_until_with_resize_timeline`,
`execute_all_with_resize_timeline`) call `mock.inject` which has
no cx-first sibling yet — deferred to a future tick that can add
the MockWezterm::inject_with_cx prerequisite first. The remaining
3 (all on TutorialSandbox) route through Scenario / MockWezterm
siblings that already exist.

New siblings on TutorialSandbox:
- new_with_cx — routes through `Scenario::setup_with_cx` (tick 65)
  so slow scenario setups (many pane injections) surface
  cancellation cleanly instead of swallowing cancel as a setup
  tracing::warn.
- with_scenario_with_cx — routes through `Scenario::setup_with_cx`;
  the Result contract surfaces cancellation as Err, matching
  legacy behaviour on setup failure.
- check_expectation_with_cx — routes the mock `get_text` through
  `MockWezterm::get_text_with_cx` so a cancelled parent cx
  interrupts the read rather than silently returning false on
  timeout. Cancellation folds into the `false` return path
  (preserves the "expectation failed or unknown → false"
  contract).

Deferred targets (need MockWezterm::inject_with_cx prerequisite):
- execute_until_with_resize_timeline (L774; Scenario body, ~150 LOC)
- execute_all_with_resize_timeline (L937; Scenario body, ~50 LOC)

Verified via fork bypass: 185/185 simulation:: tests pass.

simulation.rs cx-first coverage (TutorialSandbox cluster): 4/5
(execute_until_with_resize_timeline + _all still legacy until
MockWezterm::inject_with_cx lands).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
